title: Review: space/contact set correctness, SimplePropPatch, SQL dedup
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW-MEDIUM — Core correctness work (nonexistent IDs, atomicity, type validation) is solid. One P0 bug found: validate_member_patch accepts non-object member values. Otherwise the design patterns (SimplePropPatch enum, Phase 1/2 split, BUMP_STATE_SEQ_SQL constant) are well-chosen.
Confidence: 85% no missed bugs. Uncertainty driven by: did not trace all paths through space_set create/destroy branches (only update branch). Did not check whether ChatContact/changes has the same lying-changes bug that Space/changes had before cannotCalculateChanges fix.
